TIME Of WAR For almost thousand years; humans have journeyed into the far reaches of space, colonizing thousands of worlds and forming star-spanning alliances_ From tnese grew the five vast star empires that make up the Inner Sphere: The Inner Sphere was rife with division as the ruling dynasties warred constantly over colony worlds with valuable resources_ These titanic struggles led to the development of BattleMechs: gigantic, humanoid battle machines bristling with Iethal weapons From the twenty-fifth century onward, these walking tanks ruled the battlefields_ As the price of conflict grew; the Inner Sphere tired of war: Eventually. the five ruling Houses oined together in the Star League_ federation led by First Lord and served by its own army: For nearly two hundred years_ the Star League brought the Inner Sphere peace and prosperity: The sudden death 0f its First Lord, however; paved the way for an evil genius named Stefan Amaris to stage bloody coup d'etat: The Star League Defense Forces, commanded by the brilliant General Aleksandr Kerensky; refused to accept Amaris rule They fought him in bitter civil war that was the largest conflict ever fought by humanity; before or since_ Kerensky' forces won; but at terrible price. In the chaos that followed_ the Council Lords were each determined to step in as First Lord. Despite the efforts of Kerensky to hold together; the Star League dissolved in thirty years later: Unable to halt the conflict; Kerensky appealed to his soldiers to join him eaving the Inner Sphere. Nearly 80 percent of the Star League army heeded Kerensky call t0 build new Star League somewhere far beyond explored space Kerensky and his followers abandoned their homes ad headed into uncharted areas Of the galaxy; presumably never tO return. War followed war in the wake of Kerensky dramatic departure_ For nearly three centures; the Houses of the Inner Sphere fought vain for the right t0 rule: These Succession Wars forged new alliances and cost the Inner Sphere precious irreplaceable technolo gy: Constantly maneuvering for position, the House Lords assumed that the greatest enemy they would ever face was each other They were Wtong; While the Inner Sphere sank into barbarism, Kerensky'$ followers built new society in the harsh environs beyond known space: They developed rigid caste system based on eugenics and martial ideals, designed to produce the ultimate warriors For nearly three hundred years they were unified by one burning goal: that when the time was right; they would return home ad conquer the Inner Sphere They planned t0 be the saviors of humanity and t0 rebuild the Star League in their own image. When the warlords of the Clans decided the time had come to Iaunch their invasion , they took their powerful 'Mechs and MechWarriors and drove straight toward Terra, the birthworild ot humanity: Faced with common enemy; the states of the Inner Sphere united against the threat, establishing new Star League. Finally vic: torious in 3060, the Star League halted the Clan invasion and new era 0f peace seemed t0 loom on the horizon; But their trust is tragile, their fledgling alliances fraught with risk. And the Clans_ born and bred a5 warriors, will not suffer peace lightiy This but the eye or the storm
